Tenga la seguridad de que revisaremos cuidadosamente todas sus respuestas para asegurarnos de que estamos yendo en la dirección correcta.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400">El paquete Quiropráctico con Dr Foss incluye una consulta, examen, radiografías (si son necesarias), un informe de hallazgos, palpación de la columna vertebral y análisis de radiografías, todo por $60.</span></p> <p><img src="https://puravidasanantonio.net/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/paquetequiropracticodrfoss-1.png"></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400">Si tiene alguna pregunta o comentario adicional, no dude en comunicarse con nosotros en cualquier momento. Estamos aquí para ayudarle en todo lo que podamos.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400">Gracias.</span></p> <p>Pura Vida Chiropractic</p> <p>(210) 685-1994</p>";s:10:"recipients";s:9:"{email-1}";s:9:"from-name";s:8:"{name-1}";s:10:"form-email";s:17:"dfossdc@yahoo.com";s:13:"replyto-email";s:17:"dfossdc@yahoo.com";s:8:"cc-email";s:0:"";s:9:"bcc-email";s:0:"";s:10:"conditions";a:0:{}}}}

item.content:encoded:
Dr. Dan Foss, DC Chiropractic, Organ Manipulation, Cranial Adjusting: SOT ® Advanced Certified

Hablamos Español! FREE CONSULTATION!

Chiropractor in San Antonio, Texas

CHIROPRACTIC
CARE

NEW PRACTICE
MEMBERS

CONTACT
US

What to Expect When you Visit Pura Vida Chiropractic

Our San Antonio chiropractic office, located in the Castle Hills area, serves patients who want a more natural approach that works to address the root cause of their issues and help them create the health and quality of life they desire.

The first step is sitting down for an initial visit and going over a detailed history and examination. If X-rays are required a we utilize in office state of the art Digital X-rays. The first visit is about learning, discovering, and connecting with you.

Then we will schedule for a second appointment where we will go over your findings and present to you a personally individualized care plan specific to your healthcare needs.

Our Mission at
Pura Vida Chiropractic

The mission of Pura Vida Chiropractic is to empower the San Antonio community to achieve the health and wellness that it deserves. We put our patients first. We listen to you and help you heal. Our unique holistic approach is more proactive than traditional care. I’m a local San Antonio chiropractor, located in the Castle Hills area, who truly wants to see my patients living a healthy lifestyle. Through my own journey with health and healing I have traveled over 3 continents and 5 different countries. I have studied with master’s in chiropractic, medicine, and naturopathic medicine. Through my studies I learned that symptoms were only the tip of the iceberg. When I first began to learn about chiropractic I thought it was for pain relief but then I realized that it was so much more. I came to a realization that by only focusing on the pain and not correcting the underlying cause of the pain or the problem as doctor’s we would be doing our patients a huge dis-service. This was a major shift for me as I began studying chiropractic. There are so many specialists out there who focus on pain and so few that concentrate on health and healing. I began to study how I could help my patients not only get well quickly but stay well longer. That has become my only focus, to help sick people not only get well but stay well.

EXPLORE OUR SERVICES

3 Different Patient Types

At Pura Vida Chiropractic, we usually find that our patients fit into one of three different categories depending on their particular situation and health goals. Below you’ll see the different types of patients we serve.

  • Pain symptom relief
  • Get rid of pain and correct the cause of the pain problems
  • Wellness and maintenance to perform better

Watch the video to the right to hear Dr. Foss explain the types of patients he serves at Pura Vida Chiropractic.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gdXZhxJ6C5Y

Chiropractic Care

LATINO
COMMUNITY

CHIROPRACTIC

PREGNANCY CHIROPRACTIC

AUTO
INJURY

Meet Chiropractor Dr. Foss

Our unique approach to health and healing has brought people to my office from Chile, Colombia, Argentina, Brazil, Panama, Costa Rica, Puerto Rico, Spain, France, Ireland, Romania and Canada.

MEET DR. FOSS

MENSAJE ESPECIAL PARA MIS PACIENTES
(EN ESPAÑOL)

Muy bienvenidos a mi oficina soy Dr. Foss, Quiropráctico. ¿Tal vez ustedes llegaron aquí porque sufres de dolor? ¿No puedes trabajar? ¿Tuve un accidente o una caída? Quiero que Uds. entiendan que han llegado al sitio correcto. Puede ver este video en Español abajo. Llama mi oficina para más información.
Dr. Foss lived in several Spanish speaking countries while practicing Chiropractic. After moving to San Antonio with a large Latino community, he knew there was a need for a Spanish speaking chiropractor who understood the Latino culture and who could relate to Latino families. He understands that many Latinos living in San Antonio are looking for health care that doesn’t involve pharmaceutical drugs and unnecessary tests and exams found in traditional medicine.

This is what makes chiropractic care ideal for Latino people looking for a natural and effective way of staying healthy. To help convey chiropractic benefits to his Spanish-speaking patients, Dr. Foss created Pura Vida Chiropractic, a bilingual chiropractic clinic, where you can get the most effective chiropractic care in your native language. Being able to communicate using Spanish when working with my Latino patients lets me gain a much better understanding of who they are and how to help them. Come experience Pura Vida Chiropractic and describe what’s bothering you in Spanish – you won’t have to worry about your ailments being lost in translation.

There’s no substitute for a doctor that understands you on every level, and Dr. Foss finds that knowing the native language of his patients plays a big role in achieving that.

We can’t wait to meet you—get started today!

BOOK APPOINTMENT

Our San Antonio chiropractic office, located in the Castle Hills area, serves patients who want a more natural approach that works to address the root cause of their issues and help them create the health and quality of life they desire.<\/p>

The first step is sitting down for an initial visit and going over a detailed history and examination. If X-rays are required a we utilize in office state of the art Digital X-rays. The first visit is about learning, discovering, and connecting with you.<\/p>

Then we will schedule for a second appointment where we will go over your findings and present to you a personally individualized care plan specific to your healthcare needs.<\/strong><\/p>","align_tablet":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"d3b7b8d","elType":"section","settings":{"layout":"full_width","gap":"no","structure":"20","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"60","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"css_classes":"cstm_section_width","margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"padding_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"","right":0,"bottom":"","left":0,"isLinked":true},"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"4a2da7b","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":44.90299999999999869260136620141565799713134765625,"background_background":"classic","background_image":{"url":"","id":"","size":"","alt":"","source":"library"},"background_position":"center The mission of Pura Vida Chiropractic is to empower the San Antonio community to achieve the health and wellness that it deserves. We put our patients first. We listen to you and help you heal. Our unique holistic approach is more proactive than traditional care. I\u2019m a local San Antonio chiropractor, located in the Castle Hills area, who truly wants to see my patients living a healthy lifestyle. Through my own journey with health and healing I have traveled over 3 continents and 5 different countries. I have studied with master\u2019s in chiropractic, medicine, and naturopathic medicine. Through my studies I learned that symptoms were only the tip of the iceberg. When I first began to learn about chiropractic I thought it was for pain relief but then I realized that it was so much more. I came to a realization that by only focusing on the pain and not correcting the underlying cause of the pain or the problem as doctor\u2019s we would be doing our patients a huge dis-service. This was a major shift for me as I began studying chiropractic. There are so many specialists out there who focus on pain and so few that concentrate on health and healing. I began to study how I could help my patients not only get well quickly but stay well longer. That has become my only focus, to help sick people not only get well but stay well.<\/p>","align":"center","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":104.8719999999999998863131622783839702606201171875},"_background_background":"gradient","_background_color_b":"","_padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"a23aa48","elType":"widget","settings":{"text":"EXPLORE OUR SERVICES","align":"center","link":{"url":"","is_external":"","nofollow":"","custom_attributes":""},"__dynamic__":{"link":"[elementor-tag id=\"ac60e92\" name=\"internal-url\" settings=\"%7B%22type%22%3A%22post%22%2C%22post_id%22%3A%2218%22%7D\"]"},"__globals__":{"button_text_color":"globals\/colors?id=090bc79"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"button"}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"c0882cb","elType":"section","settings":{"structure":"20","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"50","right":0,"bottom":"35","left":0,"isLinked":false},"padding_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"10","bottom":"0","left":"10","isLinked":false},"margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"30","right":0,"bottom":"42","left":0,"isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"11d2fbe","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":null,"align_mobile":"center","margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"padding_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"space_between_widgets":5,"_inline_size_tablet":100},"elements":[{"id":"66a6d2d","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"3 Different Patient Types","__globals__":{"title_color":"globals\/colors?id=text","typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=secondary"},"align_mobile":"center","align_tablet":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"0e18bc6","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

    Muy bienvenidos a mi oficina soy Dr. Foss, Quiropr\u00e1ctico. \u00bfTal vez ustedes llegaron aqu\u00ed porque sufres de dolor? \u00bfNo puedes trabajar? \u00bfTuve un accidente o una ca\u00edda? Quiero que Uds. entiendan que han llegado al sitio correcto. Puede ver este video en Espa\u00f1ol abajo. Llama mi oficina para m\u00e1s informaci\u00f3n.
    Dr. Foss lived in several Spanish speaking countries while practicing Chiropractic. After moving to San Antonio with a large Latino community, he knew there was a need for a Spanish speaking chiropractor who understood the Latino culture and who could relate to Latino families. He understands that many Latinos living in San Antonio are looking for health care that doesn\u2019t involve pharmaceutical drugs and unnecessary tests and exams found in traditional medicine.<\/p>","align_mobile":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":true},{"id":"7b01b1c","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":null},"elements":[{"id":"b494dc2","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

    This is what makes chiropractic care ideal for Latino people looking for a natural and effective way of staying healthy. To help convey chiropractic benefits to his Spanish-speaking patients, Dr. Foss created Pura Vida Chiropractic, a bilingual chiropractic clinic, where you can get the most effective chiropractic care in your native language. Being able to communicate using Spanish when working with my Latino patients lets me gain a much better understanding of who they are and how to help them. Come experience Pura Vida Chiropractic and describe what\u2019s bothering you in Spanish \u2013 you won\u2019t have to worry about your ailments being lost in translation.<\/p>","align_mobile":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":true},{"id":"3d40ef5","elType":"section","settings":[],"elements":[{"id":"8257275","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":100,"_inline_size":null,"align":"center"},"elements":[{"id":"aca9c82","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

item.title: About Pura Vida
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
About Pura Vida

About Pura Vida

We know that you’ll feel at ease from the moment you step foot into our healing center—we’ve designed the space so that you’re relaxed, comfortable and open to wellness. Dr. Foss and the entire office team are thrilled that you’re considering care with us, and we can’t wait to welcome you into the practice.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h1DTJL0brg0

Pura Vida Chiropractic’s Mission

About Pura Vida: Our mission at Pura Vida Chiropractic is to educate and adjust as many families as possible to optimal health through natural chiropractic care. Our goal at Pura Vida Chiropractic is to provide an exceptional chiropractic experience.

At Pura Vida Chiropractic, we focus on chiropractic care for the Latino community, auto injury chiropractic, pregnancy chiropractic and youth chiropractic. Families are a large part of who we see at our office and we enjoy providing holistic health care in a caring and supportive environment.

Pura Vida Chiropractic Methods

We use specific chiropractic adjustments to the spine to remove nerve interference.

Nerve interference or “subluxations” are misalignment’s of the spine, which literally rob your body’s ability to heal, repair, and have a healthy metabolism. Chiropractic works to restore and balance the body’s ability to heal itself from the inside out. Chiropractic work’s on the premise that the body has an inborn ability to heal itself and works to restore health and vitality to the body. Symptoms are just the tip of the iceberg and chiropractic focuses on treating the cause of the problem so symptoms do not reoccur.

Quiropratico Sports Chiropractor FOSS

About Pura Vida: Our mission at Pura Vida Chiropractic is to educate and adjust as many families as possible to optimal health through natural chiropractic care. Our goal at Pura Vida Chiropractic is to provide an exceptional chiropractic experience.<\/p>

At Pura Vida Chiropractic, we focus on chiropractic care for the Latino community, auto injury chiropractic, pregnancy chiropractic and youth chiropractic. Families are a large part of who we see at our office and we enjoy providing holistic health care in a caring and supportive environment.<\/p>","align_tablet":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"88a6e9e","elType":"section","settings":{"structure":"20","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"45","right":0,"bottom":"50","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"30","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"30","right":0,"bottom":"42","left":0,"isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"f6a204e","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":60,"space_between_widgets":8,"margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"_inline_size_tablet":100,"space_between_widgets_tablet":8,"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"content_position":"center","align_tablet":"center"},"elements":[{"id":"a768ae4","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Pura Vida Chiropractic Methods","__globals__":{"typography_typography":""},"align_tablet":"center","typography_typography":"custom","typography_font_family":"Times New Roman","typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":28,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_weight":"700","typography_text_transform":"capitalize","typography_line_height":{"unit":"px","size":50,"sizes":[]},"typography_line_height_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"7081624","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

We use specific chiropractic adjustments to the spine to remove nerve interference.<\/p>

Nerve interference or \u201csubluxations\u201d are misalignment\u2019s of the spine, which literally rob your body\u2019s ability to heal, repair, and have a healthy metabolism. Chiropractic works to restore and balance the body\u2019s ability to heal itself from the inside out. Chiropractic work\u2019s on the premise that the body has an inborn ability to heal itself and works to restore health and vitality to the body. Symptoms are just the tip of the iceberg and chiropractic focuses on treating the cause of the problem so symptoms do not reoccur.<\/p>","align_tablet":"center","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"30","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"_margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"_margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"4c91535","elType":"section","settings":{"content_position":"middle","structure":"20"},"elements":[{"id":"1700946","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":38,"_inline_size_tablet":50,"margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"08","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"24","left":"0","isLinked":false},"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"6984bc5","elType":"widget","settings":{"text":"Quiropratico","link":{"url":"","is_external":"","nofollow":"","custom_attributes":""},"align":"left","align_tablet":"justify","__dynamic__":{"link":"[elementor-tag item.title: Meet Dr Foss
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
Meet Dr. Foss

Meet Dr. Foss

As a child I suffered from a condition called torticollis. I was in 3rd grade and bent down to pick up a pencil and my neck got stuck to one side. My teacher at the time sent me to the school nurse and then the school nurse sent for my mom who then took me to our family medical doctor. The family doctor took one look at my neck. Not even feeling it and told my mom this kid needs “Valium” and “Vicodin” or pain killers and muscle relaxants. My mom, who did not believe or approve of such strong medicine, much less for a 3rd grader, decided to walk out of the medical office and across the street to a chiropractor. It was the first time anyone in our family had seen a chiropractor. After a complete and thorough examination the chiropractor touched my neck and said “we found the problem.” He laid me down on the table and I felt a painless “snap and pop” and my neck straightened out.

“From that day forward I wanted to study everything I could about Chiropractic

https://youtu.be/eyMlgOcLfGs

Dr. Foss’ Chiropractic Background

I have practiced over 12 different Chiropractic techniques in 3 continents and over 7 countries. Graduated from Western States Chiropractic College, 2003 Associate Doctor – Quiropractica America Central, Costa Rica (May 2003 – June 2004) Associate Doctor – Quiropractic Barcelona, Spain (June 2004 – June 2006) Associate Locum Doctor – Locum Tenens Doctor, Ireland, Netherlands, Guatemala (June 2006 – January 2008) Associate Doctor – Advantage Healthcare, San Antonio, Texas (January 2008 – January 2010) Clinic Owner and Director – Pura Vida Chiropractic, San Antonio, Texas (January 2010 – Present) As a chiropractor in San Antonio, I opened my office, Pura Vida Chiropractic, in 2010. In Costa Rica the people say “pura vida” which means to have a pure, healthy, wholesome, and wellness-based lifestyle which is what Chiropractic is all about.

EXPLORE CHIROPRACTIC El Mejor Quiropráctico

item.title: Pura Vida Quiropráctica
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
Pura Vida Quiropráctica

Pura Vida Quiropráctica

https://youtu.be/4PVQjZ8lAH0

Pura Vida Quiropráctica se dedica en la educación de las personas acerca de la importancia de la columna y sistema nervioso y su estrecha relación con la salud. Se dedica la animación de estas personas para tomar pasos concretos para mejor y mantenerse la salud.

El Doctor en Quiropráctica Dr. Dan Foss se enfoca en la detección, análisis, y eliminación del mal funcionamiento del aparato columna médula espinal (degenerativos vertebral).

Que es La Quiropráctica

En el Centro Pura Vida Quiropráctica entendemos que hay muchas formas de estrés (físico, emocional, químico). Estos estreses son muy comunes y afectan recién nacidos hasta personas mayores. Estas estreses afectan mal funcionamiento de la columna vertebral y la médula espinal (subluxacion vertebral)

Sabemos que las subluxaciones vertebrales son una condición muy seria. En el corto mediano plazo causan interferencia a los mensajes entre el encéfalo y el tejido abastecido por un nervio. Así una baja en el rendimiento corporal. Al mediano largo plazo causan cambios degenerativos en los tejidos resultando en una enfermedad y muerte prematura.

Deseamos que todo las personas que estén expuestas a un estrés continuo o repetitivo o incluso que sufran de una mala salud, acuden nuestro centro.

Queremos que vengan las personas que muestran irregularidades en La simetría de..La postura o ..El arco de movilidad de cuello o columna dorsal o lumbar. Esperamos ver muchos niños para quitar subluxaciones que originan en esta etapa de la vida para que no se desarrollen condiciones medicas serias en los años adultos y mayores. Una columna vertebral que funciona bien resulta en una sistema nervioso libre de interferencia que a su vez garantiza un mejor rendimiento del cuerpo. Así el cuerpo tendrá sus mejores fuerzas de protección y recuperación para combatir en contra de cualquier trauma o enfermedad.

Para mas información llámame a mi oficina a 1210-685-1994.

Dr. Foss’ Chiropractic Background

I have practiced over 12 different Chiropractic techniques in 3 continents and over 7 countries. Graduated from Western States Chiropractic College, 2003 Associate Doctor – Quiropractica America Central, Costa Rica (May 2003 – June 2004) Associate Doctor – Quiropractic Barcelona, Spain (June 2004 – June 2006) Associate Locum Doctor – Ireland, Netherlands, Guatemala (June 2006 – January 2008) Associate Doctor – Advantage Healthcare, San Antonio, Texas (January 2008 – January 2010) Clinic Owner and Director – Pura Vida Chiropractic, San Antonio, Texas (January 2010 – Present) As a chiropractor in San Antonio, I opened my office, Pura Vida Chiropractic, in 2010. In Costa Rica the people say “pura vida” which means to have a pure, healthy, wholesome, and wellness-based lifestyle which is what Chiropractic is all about.

Quiropratico

In Costa Rica the people say \u201c<\/span>pura vida<\/span>\u201d which means to have a pure, healthy, wholesome, and wellness-based lifestyle which is what <\/span>Chiropractic<\/a><\/span> is all about.<\/span><\/p>","align":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"bc47b60","elType":"widget","settings":{"text":" Quiropratico","align":"center","typography_typography":"custom","typography_font_family":"Lato","typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":16,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_size_tablet":{"unit":"px","size":14,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":18,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_weight":"400","typography_text_transform":"uppercase","background_color":"#78125C","border_radius":{"unit":"px","top":"4","right":"4","bottom":"4","left":"4","isLinked":true},"text_padding":{"unit":"px","top":"017","right":"55","bottom":"017","left":"55","isLinked":false},"text_padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"017","right":"50","bottom":"017","left":"50","isLinked":false},"_element_width":"initial","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":106.0580000000000069348971010185778141021728515625},"__globals__":{"button_background_hover_color":"globals\/colors?id=accent"},"link":{"url":"","is_external":"","nofollow":"","custom_attributes":""},"__dynamic__":{"link":"[elementor-tag id=\"1320b5b\" name=\"internal-url\" settings=\"%7B%22type%22%3A%22post%22%2C%22post_id%22%3A%221580%22%7D\"]"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"button"}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"d2a18d6","elType":"section","settings":{"background_background":"classic","__globals__":{"background_color":"globals\/colors?id=1cf2376"},"content_width":{"unit":"px","size":1200,"sizes":[]},"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"6feb5e8","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":100,"_inline_size":null},"elements":[{"id":"6efb6ba","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

item.title: Mission Trips
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
Mission Trips

Mission Trips

Dr. Foss has served on various chiropractic mission trips throughout Mexico, Panama, and Costa Rica. He was given the key to Panama City for his efforts in Panama in the summer of 2008.

item.title: Chiropractic Care
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
Chiropractic Care

Chiropractic Care in San Antonio, TX

Chiropractic care is health maintenance of the spinal column, discs, related nerves and bone geometry without drugs or surgery. It involves the art and science of adjusting misaligned joints of the body, especially of the spine, which reduces spinal nerve stress and therefore promotes health throughout the body.

That’s the true power of chiropractic care.

Care Chiropractic

Some of our most popular techniques include:

PEDIATRIC CHIROPRACTOR

PRENATAL CHIROPRACTOR

INFANTS & CHIROPRACTIC

PREGNANCY CHIROPRACTIC

AUTO
INJURY

item.title: Latino Community
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
Latino Community

San Antonio Quiropractico

As a San Antonio Chiropractor, more specifically, in the Castle Hills area, I made a promise to myself – I would extend the best care to all of my patients, regardless of the language they speak.
Working with clients from all over the globe – from Asia to Europe – helped me understand the importance of providing chiropractic care to everyone. To this end, and because of the large Latino community in Castle Hills and all of San Antonio, I decided to ensure each of my Latino patients gets proper treatment even if they’re not that familiar with the English language.
My bilingual Latino clients also benefit greatly from the opportunity to describe back pain and ailments in their native language – being able to understand them in Spanish guarantees that I catch on to every nuance when listening to their health.

Latino Community in San Antonio Holistic Chiropractic Care Latino Community in San Antonio

Recognizing the significant Latino community in Castle Hills, which comprises nearly 40% of the area’s residents, underscored the need for tailored chiropractic care. There was a void in providing affordable, bilingual chiropractic services – a situation we aimed to transform.
Our Latino client base is as varied as it is large. From office workers to entrepreneurs and expectant mothers, all face unique occupational health challenges. Long hours spent sitting at desks can lead to back and neck pain. Similarly, construction workers and teachers, who often stand for extended periods or engage in repetitive movements, also present with musculoskeletal discomfort and need pain relief.
Moreover, Latino athletes and fitness enthusiasts regularly turn to our chiropractic clinic in Castle Hills. Their goal is not only to alleviate existing discomfort but also to enhance their performance. Through our expert chiropractic care, we help them feel more vibrant and energized, giving them an edge in their respective sports

Holistic Chiropractic Care

I’m well aware that Latino people in Texas have always appreciated natural remedies and ways of staying healthy and addressing pain relief without resorting to pharmaceuticals or other traditional healthcare approaches. I am proud to offer holistic chiropractic care – one that fixes the entire body, rather than just focusing on its parts.

  • Plenty of my Latino clients come to me because of an injury, back pain, neck pain, or a feeling of reduced well-being. Some, however, simply want an alternative to modern medicine that doesn’t always help as much as it promises to. I welcome the desire to restore your body to health and keep it that way while minimizing your reliance on chemicals and unnatural treatments. Doctors these days have a habit of prescribing first and asking questions later, which doesn’t help instill faith – we’ve all heard concerning stories of pharmaceutical drugs doing more harm than good.
  • When you let Pura Vida serve help, you no longer have to worry about foreign compounds making you ill while chiropractors prescribe medicines promising to make things better, nor will you be forced to work with a physician who doesn’t understand the patient’s needs.
  • I see the body as a single entity rather than one comprised of parts – before we can give you chiropractic treatment, we will first need to address your general health and wellness.
  • Latino people are known for their strong and indomitable spirit. Yet we all know that the stresses of modern life can make it very difficult for bodies to keep up with spirits. If you’ve been experiencing hardships in your day-to-day, don’t put the blame on yourself – every day, we are asked to do more while less and less attention is paid to our needs.
  • The moment you step through the doors of my Pura Vida Chiropractic clinic as a new patient for your first visit, I promise you that will change. To heal a person, one first needs to understand them well. This is why knowing Spanish allows me to be the best chiropractor I can be. I’m grateful for the ability to talk to my patients in their native language and better learn what troubles their wellness.
  • To get how we do things, you need not look past the name of my clinic: Pura Vida, or Pure Life, for everyone. Your body is an incredibly powerful mechanism. To us, purity means helping your body repair itself with gentle nudges and chiropractic adjustment rather than resorting to outside influences in hopes of fixing things.
  • We’ve made sure that our Latino clients feel as if their treatments at Pura Vida go in line with the way they want to lead their lives – strengthening the body and mind to cope with whatever life throws their way. Our chiropractic care doesn’t just aim to fix the problem, but the offers a higher quality of life, letting you enjoy any activity you set your mind too.

Latino Community

San Antonio Quiropractico

[elementor-element k="8c6c5595ced8612dfac958da085dd3f3" data=""]
Latino Community in San Antonio
Holistic Chiropractic Care
Latino Community in San Antonio

Recognizing the significant Latino community in Castle Hills, which comprises nearly 40% of the area’s residents, underscored the need for tailored chiropractic care. There was a void in providing affordable, bilingual chiropractic services – a situation we aimed to transform.
Our Latino client base is as varied as it is large. From office workers to entrepreneurs and expectant mothers, all face unique occupational health challenges. Long hours spent sitting at desks can lead to back and neck pain. Similarly, construction workers and teachers, who often stand for extended periods or engage in repetitive movements, also present with musculoskeletal discomfort and need pain relief.
Moreover, Latino athletes and fitness enthusiasts regularly turn to our chiropractic clinic in Castle Hills. Their goal is not only to alleviate existing discomfort but also to enhance their performance. Through our expert chiropractic care, we help them feel more vibrant and energized, giving them an edge in their respective sports

Holistic Chiropractic Care

I’m well aware that Latino people in Texas have always appreciated natural remedies and ways of staying healthy and addressing pain relief without resorting to pharmaceuticals or other traditional healthcare approaches. I am proud to offer holistic chiropractic care – one that fixes the entire body, rather than just focusing on its parts.

  • Plenty of my Latino clients come to me because of an injury, back pain, neck pain, or a feeling of reduced well-being. Some, however, simply want an alternative to modern medicine that doesn’t always help as much as it promises to. I welcome the desire to restore your body to health and keep it that way while minimizing your reliance on chemicals and unnatural treatments. Doctors these days have a habit of prescribing first and asking questions later, which doesn’t help instill faith – we’ve all heard concerning stories of pharmaceutical drugs doing more harm than good.
  • When you let Pura Vida serve help, you no longer have to worry about foreign compounds making you ill while chiropractors prescribe medicines promising to make things better, nor will you be forced to work with a physician who doesn’t understand the patient’s needs.
  • I see the body as a single entity rather than one comprised of parts – before we can give you chiropractic treatment, we will first need to address your general health and wellness.
  • Latino people are known for their strong and indomitable spirit. Yet we all know that the stresses of modern life can make it very difficult for bodies to keep up with spirits. If you’ve been experiencing hardships in your day-to-day, don’t put the blame on yourself – every day, we are asked to do more while less and less attention is paid to our needs.
  • The moment you step through the doors of my Pura Vida Chiropractic clinic as a new patient for your first visit, I promise you that will change. To heal a person, one first needs to understand them well. This is why knowing Spanish allows me to be the best chiropractor I can be. I’m grateful for the ability to talk to my patients in their native language and better learn what troubles their wellness.
  • To get how we do things, you need not look past the name of my clinic: Pura Vida, or Pure Life, for everyone. Your body is an incredibly powerful mechanism. To us, purity means helping your body repair itself with gentle nudges and chiropractic adjustment rather than resorting to outside influences in hopes of fixing things.
  • We’ve made sure that our Latino clients feel as if their treatments at Pura Vida go in line with the way they want to lead their lives – strengthening the body and mind to cope with whatever life throws their way. Our chiropractic care doesn’t just aim to fix the problem, but the offers a higher quality of life, letting you enjoy any activity you set your mind too.

item.title: Pediatric Chiropractor
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
Pediatric Chiropractor

Pediatric Chiropractor San Antonio

Dr. Foss is a San Antonio Pediatric Chiropractor who also offers services to kids as a child chiropractor. Kids love to run jump and play almost every day, seldom thinking of the future impact it could have on their lives. However, if we as adults had as much impact in our lives we would certainly be crippled fast. This is due to the high amount of “spongy bone” in kids’ bones, and as we get older this decreases over time. This fact is why kids don’t break bones as often as adults. It is also the reason why kids need chiropractic so much.

Parents are always urging their kids to “straighten up” instead of hunching over, and with good reason – having poor posture in your youth can lead to a variety of problems early on. The spine develops until somewhere around the age of 25, but in reality, most of the damage done by the time a person is 18 is very hard to fix. As a pediatric chiropractor, I sometimes get calls from parents asking whether their child is too young to receive chiropractic care, and the answer is always the same – it’s never too early to receive pediatric chiropractic care.

https://youtu.be/fipTPhQ8ARw

San Antonio Quiropractico

Bringing your child to Pura Vida Chiropractic for treatment as a new patient may be difficult at first. Some children might refuse to cooperate as they don’t understand what the treatment can do for them – they’d much rather be off somewhere else, doing something more entertaining.

When working with kids, I aim for a lighthearted approach that engages the child and makes chiropractic treatment seem less like a chore and more like something they enjoy doing. I find that even really young children warm up to the idea of treatment once I’ve had the chance to explain its benefits, as well as the risks associated with bad posture. While it’s true that subluxation hasn’t had as much time to develop in the bodies of children when compared to adults, kids can still suffer from spinal misalignments and nerve issues, especially if they’re involved in activities that deteriorate their posture. Chiropractic adjustments and chiropractic treatment may be necessary.

Some kids that visit my office for their first visit – especially younger ones – are afraid that the treatment is going to be painful or unpleasant. Here, it helps to explain that the body is being put back in place rather than being subjected to a strange treatment. Once the child understands the mechanics behind pediatric chiropractic care and what it seeks to accomplish, moving forward and intense chiropractic adjustments become easier.

Why children need chiropractic more often than you might think

As adults, we know we should remain upright and maintain our posture for our own well-being. Very few children, however, understand how important it is – to them, parents complaining about their posture can seem as if they’re just nagging. Due to a lack of knowledge and experience, some kids willingly assume a poor posture in their parent’s absence in order to spite them. This is far from the only thing putting children at risk of back pain. Modern life has made it very difficult for a child’s spine to remain upright because of all the digital entertainment that encourages posturing.

Children as young as 8 years old can be seen hunching over their smartphone for hours, bending forward in front of the computer, playing video games on deceivingly comfortable armchairs and sofas and so forth. All of these activities place a lot of stress on your child’s spine and can also cause difficulties with the nervous system when given enough time.

Even the best treatment can only do so much – there’s nothing like explaining the importance of good posture and spinal health to a child and thereby setting the course for their healthcare for the coming years. I did mention that a lighthearted approach works best when working with children, but that doesn’t mean I won’t treat them like adults – no matter if your child is 8 or 16 years old, I will explain how vital a healthy spine is in great detail. With the right approach, the lesson will stick with your child well into the adult years.

Making the future safer for your kids through chiropractic

They’re called formative years for a reason – the body will tend to grow in whatever direction it’s allowed to. An upright posture will cause proper upwards development while being hunched over for hours each day can easily lead to sub-optimal growth. Your child can only do so
much, even after absorbing everything I share. If his or her body is already a victim of misalignment, chiropractic treatment is necessary to restore its full function and help reassure that the child’s future development is on course.

Chiropractic sessions at Pura Vida will energize your child and prepare them for the transition into adulthood, both physical and mental. Once harmony is restored, the youngster won’t just have an easier time performing any physical task, from writing to sports – he or she will also find it easier to concentrate and study. The benefits of chiropractic care extend far beyond revitalizing your body so that it can better handle everyday stress – just ask any of my patients who have dealt with chronic pain for years on end before finally picking up the phone and giving me a call.

Kids love to run jump and play almost every day, seldom thinking of the future impact it could have on their lives. However, if we as adults had as much impact in our lives we would certainly be crippled fast. This is due to the high amount of \u201cspongy bone\u201d in kids\u2019 bones, and as we get older this decreases over time. This fact is why kids don\u2019t break bones as often as adults. It is also the reason why kids need chiropractic so much.<\/span><\/p>

Parents are always urging their kids to \u201cstraighten up\u201d instead of hunching over, and with good reason \u2013 having <\/span>poor posture<\/span> in your youth can lead to a variety of problems early on. The spine develops until somewhere around the age of 25, but in reality, most of the damage done by the time a person is 18 is very hard to fix. As a <\/span>pediatric chiropractor<\/span>, I sometimes get calls from parents asking whether their child is too young to receive <\/span>chiropractic care<\/a><\/span>, and the answer is always the same \u2013 it\u2019s never too early to receive <\/span>pediatric chiropractic care<\/a><\/span>.<\/span><\/p>","align_tablet":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":true},{"id":"7a6f175","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":null,"_inline_size_tablet":100,"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"ba28864","elType":"widget","settings":{"youtube_url":"https:\/\/youtu.be\/fipTPhQ8ARw","vimeo_url":"https:\/\/vimeo.com\/235215203","dailymotion_url":"https:\/\/www.dailymotion.com\/video\/x6tqhqb","hosted_url":{"url":"https:\/\/puravidasanantonio.net\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023\/05\/About-us-Page-Video-Puravida.mp4","id":715,"size":"","alt":"","source":"library"},"aspect_ratio":"43","show_image_overlay":"yes","image_overlay":{"url":"","id":"","size":"","alt":"","source":"library"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"video"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"bdf5a2f","elType":"section","settings":{"background_background":"classic","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"10","right":0,"bottom":"50","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"25","right":"0","bottom":"18","left":"0","isLinked":false},"padding_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"36","right":"0","bottom":"16","left":"0","isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"background_color":""}},"elements":[{"id":"1ecf359","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":100,"_inline_size":null},"elements":[{"id":"6bfc339","elType":"section","settings":{"structure":"20","reverse_order_tablet":"reverse-tablet","reverse_order_mobile":"reverse-mobile"},"elements":[{"id":"4a9dfe7","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":36.04899999999999948840923025272786617279052734375,"_inline_size_tablet":100,"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"3d09863","elType":"widget","settings":{"image":{"url":"https:\/\/puravidasanantonio.net\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023\/05\/Pura-Vida-Chiropratic-San-Antonio-Quiropractico.jpg","id":3455,"size":"","alt":"","source":"library"},"image_border_radius":{"unit":"px","top":"8","right":"8","bottom":"8","left":"8","isLinked":true}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"}],"isInner":true},{"id":"4c1fca7","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":63.95100000000000051159076974727213382720947265625,"_inline_size_tablet":100,"space_between_widgets":8,"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"50","bottom":"0","left":"40","isLinked":false},"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"10","bottom":"0","left":"10","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"0205eae","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"San Antonio Quiropractico","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"title_color":"globals\/colors?id=secondary","typography_typography":""},"title_color":"#212934","typography_typography":"custom","typography_font_family":"Times New Roman","typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":28,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_weight":"700","typography_line_height_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"_margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"align_tablet":"center","typography_line_height":{"unit":"px","size":48,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"5a600a2","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

Bringing your child to Pura Vida Chiropractic<\/a> for treatment as a <\/span>new patient<\/a><\/span> may be difficult at first. Some children might refuse to cooperate as they don\u2019t understand what the treatment can do for them \u2013 they\u2019d much rather be off somewhere else, doing something more entertaining.<\/span><\/p>

When working with kids, I aim for a lighthearted approach that engages the child and makes <\/span>chiropractic treatment<\/a><\/span> seem less like a chore and more like something they enjoy doing. I find that even really young children warm up to the idea of treatment once I\u2019ve had the chance to explain its benefits, as well as the risks associated with bad posture<\/a>. While it\u2019s true that <\/span>subluxation<\/span> hasn\u2019t had as much time to develop in the bodies of children when compared to adults, kids can still suffer from <\/span>spinal misalignments<\/a><\/span> and nerve issues, especially if they\u2019re involved in activities that deteriorate their posture. <\/span>Chiropractic adjustments<\/a><\/span> and <\/span>chiropractic treatment<\/a><\/span> may be necessary.<\/span><\/p>

Some kids that visit my office for their <\/span>first visit<\/a><\/span> \u2013 especially younger ones \u2013 are afraid that the treatment is going to be painful or unpleasant. Here, it helps to explain that the body is being put back in place rather than being subjected to a strange treatment. Once the child understands the mechanics behind <\/span>pediatric chiropractic care<\/span> and what it seeks to accomplish, moving forward and intense <\/span>chiropractic adjustments<\/a><\/span> become easier.<\/span><\/p>","align_tablet":"center","_element_width":"initial","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":99.8229999999999932924765744246542453765869140625}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"5e8931b","elType":"section","settings":{"structure":"20","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"34","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"38","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"30","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"background_background":"classic","padding":{"unit":"px","top":"55","right":"0","bottom":"48","left":"0","isLinked":false},"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"50","right":"0","bottom":"52","left":"0","isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"background_color":"globals\/colors?id=1cf2376"}},"elements":[{"id":"651d042","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":63.951999999999998181010596454143524169921875,"_inline_size_tablet":100,"content_position":"center","space_between_widgets":8,"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"55","bottom":"0","left":"10","isLinked":false},"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"10","bottom":"0","left":"10","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"9546295","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Why children need chiropractic more often than you might think","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"title_color":"globals\/colors?id=secondary","typography_typography":""},"title_color":"#212934","typography_typography":"custom","typography_font_family":"Times New Roman","typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":28,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_weight":"700","typography_line_height_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"_margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"align_tablet":"center","typography_line_height":{"unit":"px","size":48,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"75159b0","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

As adults, we know we should remain upright and maintain our posture for our own <\/span>well-being<\/span>. Very few children, however, understand how important it is \u2013 to them, parents complaining about their posture can seem as if they\u2019re just nagging. Due to a lack of knowledge and experience, some kids willingly assume a <\/span>poor posture<\/a><\/span> in their parent\u2019s absence in order to spite them. This is far from the only thing putting children at risk of <\/span>back pain<\/a><\/span>. Modern life has made it very difficult for a <\/span>child\u2019s spine<\/span> to remain upright because of all the digital entertainment that encourages posturing.<\/span><\/p>

Children as young as 8 years old can be seen hunching over their smartphone for hours, bending forward in front of the computer, playing video games on deceivingly comfortable armchairs and sofas and so forth. All of these activities place a <\/span>lot of stress<\/span> on your <\/span>child\u2019s spine<\/span> and can also cause difficulties with the <\/span>nervous system<\/span> when given enough time.<\/span><\/p>

Even the best treatment can only do so much \u2013 there\u2019s nothing like explaining the importance of good posture and <\/span>spinal health<\/a><\/span> to a child and thereby setting the course for their <\/span>healthcare<\/span> for the coming years. I did mention that a lighthearted approach works best when working with children, but that doesn\u2019t mean I won\u2019t treat them like adults \u2013 no matter if your child is 8 or 16 years old, I will explain how vital a healthy spine is in great detail. With the right approach, the lesson will stick with your child well into the adult years.<\/span><\/p>","align_tablet":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":false},{"id":"a34ca68","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":36,"_inline_size_tablet":100},"elements":[{"id":"a9504af","elType":"widget","settings":{"image":{"url":"https:\/\/puravidasanantonio.net\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023\/05\/Pura-Vida-Chiropratic-Why-children-need-chiropractic-more-often-than-you-might-think.jpg","id":3477,"size":"","alt":"","source":"library"},"image_border_radius":{"unit":"px","top":"8","right":"8","bottom":"8","left":"8","isLinked":true}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"8615856","elType":"section","settings":{"background_background":"classic","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"50","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"30","right":"0","bottom":"14","left":"0","isLinked":false},"padding_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"36","right":"0","bottom":"16","left":"0","isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"background_color":""}},"elements":[{"id":"f80310a","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":100,"_inline_size":null},"elements":[{"id":"f26bcf1","elType":"section","settings":{"structure":"20","reverse_order_tablet":"reverse-tablet","reverse_order_mobile":"reverse-mobile"},"elements":[{"id":"ac98294","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":36.04899999999999948840923025272786617279052734375,"_inline_size_tablet":100,"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"bff65bc","elType":"widget","settings":{"image":{"url":"https:\/\/puravidasanantonio.net\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023\/05\/Pura-Vida-Chiropratic-Making-the-future-safer-for-your-kids-through-chiropractic.jpg","id":3481,"size":"","alt":"","source":"library"},"image_border_radius":{"unit":"px","top":"8","right":"8","bottom":"8","left":"8","isLinked":true}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"}],"isInner":true},{"id":"5ee1149","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":63.95100000000000051159076974727213382720947265625,"_inline_size_tablet":100,"space_between_widgets":8,"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"50","bottom":"0","left":"40","isLinked":false},"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"10","bottom":"0","left":"10","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"4887115","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Making the future safer for your kids through chiropractic","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"title_color":"globals\/colors?id=secondary","typography_typography":""},"title_color":"#212934","typography_typography":"custom","typography_font_family":"Times Roman","typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":28,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_weight":"700","typography_line_height_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"_margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"align_tablet":"center","typography_line_height":{"unit":"px","size":48,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"d9cd579","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

They\u2019re called formative years for a reason \u2013 the body will tend to grow in whatever direction it\u2019s allowed to. An upright posture will cause proper upwards development while being hunched over for hours each day can easily lead to sub-optimal growth. Your child can only do so<\/span>
<\/span>much, even after absorbing everything I share. If his or her body is already a victim of <\/span>misalignment<\/span>, <\/span>chiropractic treatment<\/a><\/span> is necessary to restore its full function and help reassure that the child\u2019s future development is on course.<\/span><\/p>\n

Chiropractic sessions at Pura Vida will energize your child and prepare them for the transition into adulthood, both physical and mental. Once harmony is restored, the youngster won\u2019t just have an easier time performing any physical task, from writing to sports \u2013 he or she will also find it easier to concentrate and study. The benefits of <\/span>chiropractic care<\/a><\/span> extend far beyond revitalizing your body so that it can better handle everyday stress \u2013 just ask any of my patients who have dealt with <\/span>chronic pain<\/span> for years on end before finally picking up the phone and giving me a call.<\/span><\/p>","align_tablet":"center","_element_width":"initial","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":99.8229999999999932924765744246542453765869140625}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"e25c86f","elType":"section","settings":{"background_background":"classic","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"50","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"38","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"background_color":"globals\/colors?id=1cf2376"}},"elements":[{"id":"dd1f426","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":100,"_inline_size":null},"elements":[{"id":"8338797","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

item.title: Prenatal Chiropractor
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
Prenatal Chiropractor

Prenatal Chiropractor in San Antonio

Dr. Foss treats pregnant women with gentle chiropractic adjustments to help with things like back pain often experienced with pregnancy. He also uses Webster Technique to balance the pelvis for an easier pregnancy and delivery, as well as give the growing baby room in the womb.

According to the American Pregnancy Association, Chiropractic is a very safe and effective treatment to restore motion to the spine and joints during pregnancy. During pregnancy, there are several physiologic and endocrine changes that occur in preparation for creating the environment for the developing baby. The following changes could result in a misaligned spine or joints:

  • Protruding abdomen and increased back curve
  • Pelvic changes
  • Postural adaptations
  • Protruding abdomen and increased back curve
  • Pelvic changes
  • Postural adaptations

Establishing pelvic balance and alignment is another reason to obtain chiropractic prenatal care during pregnancy. When the pelvis is misaligned it may reduce the amount of room available for the developing baby. This restriction is called intrauterine constraint. A misaligned pelvis may also make it difficult for the baby to get into the best possible position for delivery. This can affect the mother’s ability to have a natural, non-invasive birth. Breech and posterior positions can interfere with the natural ease of labor and lead to interventions such as c-sections.

According to the American Pregnancy Association, Chiropractic<\/a> is a very safe and effective treatment to restore motion to the spine and joints during pregnancy. During pregnancy, there are several physiologic and endocrine changes that occur in preparation for creating the environment for the developing baby.     Establishing pelvic balance and alignment is another reason to obtain chiropractic <\/a><\/span>prenatal<\/a><\/span> care during pregnancy<\/a>. When the pelvis is misaligned it may reduce the amount of room available for the developing baby. This restriction is called intrauterine constraint. A misaligned pelvis may also make it difficult for the baby to get into the best possible position for delivery. This can affect the mother\u2019s ability to have a natural, non-invasive birth. Breech and posterior positions can interfere with the natural ease of labor and lead to interventions such as c-sections.<\/span><\/p>","align_tablet":"center","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"20","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"15ba812","elType":"section","settings":{"background_background":"classic","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"25","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"18","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"background_color":"globals\/colors?id=1cf2376"},"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"20","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"1730c39","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":100,"_inline_size":null},"elements":[{"id":"4e5cc69","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

item.title: Infants and Chiropractic
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
Infants Chiropractor

Infants and Chiropractic

Most of the time the general public see’s Chiropractor’s as specialists in back pain. As chiropractor’s we are trained to detect and correct subluxations. Subluxations are misalignments in the spine causing interference to the nervous system which impacts the function of the body. This can have massive impacts on the health of the body.

The first subluxation that occurs is many times the birthing process itself. Many times it can be pulling and twisting of the baby’s head as it’s being born. These subluxations can be aggravated even more by a forceps delivery or suction delivery and also a c-section.

When a baby or infant has subluxations in the spine this can cause many conditions such as:

  • Colic
  • Reflux
  • Latching Issues or Tongue Tie
  • Constipation
  • Difficulty Sleeping
  • Allergies
  • Ear Infections
  • Failure to thrive

Many families choose to have their babies checked as soon as possible after birth. In our office we recommend to allot of our pregnant patients that they bring their babies in as soon as possible after the birth to get the child evaluated for subluxations.

We use very gentle techniques to check infants. Their spines are very flexible and fragile and it’s important to be very gentle. We also evaluate many early reflexes in infants in addition to sucking reflexes to check for any latching issues.

Dr Foss uses Cranial Chiropractic to adjust the cranial bones of the skull and face to help assist with latching and to free up any subluxations in the skull in addition to the spine. This is how he sees infants and chiropractic.

If you have any questions about how your baby or infant can get checked in our office give us a call.

item.title: Auto Injury Chiropractor
item.dc:creator: Avatardesk
item.content:encoded:
Auto Injury Chiropractor

Auto Injury Chiropractic Care San Antonio

An auto injury can devastate a person on many levels – physically, emotionally, and financially. When I work with someone who has experienced an auto injury, I focus on repairing more than just the body, regardless of how serious the injury was. Whether you had an auto injury yesterday or years ago, visiting Pura Vida Chiropractic is the first real step towards getting your body back to where it should be. Where other forms of medicine might have left you feeling uncomfortable and with constant pain/headaches, chiropractic care will do what’s necessary to have you back in health.

Auto Accident When To See A Chiropractor

Car accidents come in all orders of magnitude, but always have one thing in common – they put a lot of sudden stress on your body. Whether it’s whiplash or a significant personal injury, impact with another car creates a shock wave that negatively affects the driver’s body(and the bodies of any passengers) in multiple ways. Your nervous system loses its balance as different parts of your skeleton become misaligned. The damage done isn’t always visible – far from it.

Even if you think you’re injury-free by merely getting shaken up, you might be in all sorts of trouble. Oftentimes, the worst kind of damage caused by auto accident injuries ends up being the damage we fail to recognize until it’s too late. The damage we failed to address because you did not feel any neck pain or back pain following the accident. Many realignments I perform are small, in proportion to the level of misalignment, but they end up making a world of difference.

Similarly, patients who have broken a limb or experienced a fracture will focus on this injury and ignore all others, like those that are invisible but hurt your health just the same. In the absence of a certified chiropractor, people will struggle to understand why various aches, impeded motor function, and postural difficulties persist long after the fractured appendage has ostensibly healed.

Chiropractic Care For Driving All Day

Car seats look comfortable, but they can wreak havoc on your spine and even chronic pain. Many of my clients require treatment simply for spending a lot of time inside a car on a daily basis. The overwhelming majority of these seats place your body in an unnatural position and force you to assume an unhealthy posture.

This makes car accidents and any subsequent car injuries, big or small, all the more devastating. Pressure is placed on your body while it’s out of position, multiplying the negative effect. This is also why plenty of people will struggle just to assume a normal posture after a car accident.

Treating auto injury-related ailments requires me to recognize the position your body was in when the accident happened, and then reverse-engineering it back to health with the help of specific chiropractic techniques.

Auto Accident And Chiropractic Adjustments

The way modern medicine deals with a fracture or bone break leaves much to be desired –’align’ the affected area and place it inside a cast. It doesn’t take an expert to see why this can cause additional issues as the fracture heals.

For starters, there’s no way to monitor how the body repairs its injured part under the cast. There’s typically enough leeway under a plaster cast for the person to squirm the limb into a position that seems most comfortable, even if that causes complications.

This is why so many people feel their broken limb is nowhere near what it used to be even long after the cast has been removed. Before the once-fractured area can truly heal, extensive chiropractic treatment is necessary to restore balance – treatment on not just the limb in question, but the entire body as well. A solid treatment plan that isn’t executed can lead to injury treatment and pain relief requests down the road.

More problems arise as your whole body is forced to assume a stressful position due to broken or fractured bones. Merely having a cast will often create the need for me to repair other parts of your body, starting with the spine. Patients will sometimes ask why they feel aches in that were not affected by the accident. The body acts as a whole, and it needs to be repaired as such.

Of course, neck and spine-related auto injuries are some of the hardest I treat but are nonetheless manageable with enough patience. A neck injury will usually cause a good portion of the spine to get ‘stuck’ out of position, and only someone with chiropractic knowledge can put things back in place without causing additional injuries neck pain, or chronic pain. This is why I thoroughly examine new patients before starting the treatment – I have to create a model of balance before fixing the imbalance.

Stealth Ailments Stemming From Auto Injuries

Let’s say you’ve seemingly dealt with your car accident and returned to everyday life. You got your insurance or settlement money, you had your car repaired, and you visited a doctor who assured you that everything is okay.

Yet something still doesn’t quite feel right. You may or may not be able to pinpoint what it is – a distant ache, a general feeling of discomfort, increased difficulty when performing mundane tasks, headaches, irritability and so on.

As previously mentioned, it’s very likely that the powerful shock from the car accident either created a misalignment or aggravated an existing condition. Some of my patients came to me years after their auto injury made everyday life more difficult.

While exceptionally strong, the spine and its vertebrae are more vulnerable to sudden stress than you might think. These so-called ‘stealth’ injuries aren’t nearly as apparent as a full-on fracture, but will eventually show: lifting that household object might inexplicably become more difficult, or sitting upright much harder as the hours go by.

Don’t ignore the warning signs and silent cries of your body – it knows when it’s hurting, and so do you, even if your doctor says otherwise. No pain and discomfort should be called normal – if you feel like you haven’t been the same ever since you had a car accident, schedule a visit to Pura Vida Chiropractic. We promise to make things better than they were even before the injury took place.

Adjustments","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"title_color":"globals\/colors?id=secondary","typography_typography":""},"title_color":"#212934","typography_typography":"custom","typography_font_family":"Times New Roman","typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":28,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_weight":"700","typography_line_height_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"_margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"align_tablet":"center","typography_line_height":{"unit":"px","size":48,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"a0280ff","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

The way modern medicine deals with a fracture or bone break leaves much to be desired \u2013\u2019align\u2019 the affected area and place it inside a cast. It doesn\u2019t take an expert to see why this can cause additional issues as the fracture heals.<\/span><\/p>

For starters, there\u2019s no way to monitor how the body repairs its injured part under the cast. There\u2019s typically enough leeway under a plaster cast for the person to squirm the limb into a position that seems most comfortable, even if that causes complications.<\/span><\/p>

This is why so many people feel their broken limb is nowhere near what it used to be even long after the cast has been removed. Before the once-fractured area can truly heal, extensive <\/span>chiropractic treatment<\/span> is necessary to restore balance \u2013 treatment on not just the limb in question, but the entire body as well. A solid <\/span>treatment plan<\/span> that isn\u2019t executed can lead to <\/span>injury treatment<\/span> and <\/span>pain relief<\/span><\/a> requests down the road.<\/span><\/p>","align_tablet":"center","_element_width":"initial","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":99.8229999999999932924765744246542453765869140625}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":true},{"id":"044b7b6","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

More problems arise as your whole body is forced to assume a stressful position due to broken or fractured bones. Merely having a cast will often create the need for me to repair other parts of your body, starting with the spine. Patients will sometimes ask why they feel aches in that were not affected by the accident. The body acts as a whole, and it needs to be repaired as such.<\/span><\/p>

Of course, neck and spine-related auto injuries<\/a> are some of the hardest I treat but are nonetheless manageable with enough patience. A neck injury will usually cause a good portion of the spine to get \u2018stuck\u2019 out of position, and only someone with chiropractic knowledge can put things back in place without causing additional injuries <\/span>neck pain<\/span>, or <\/span>chronic pain<\/span>. This is why I thoroughly examine <\/span>new patients<\/a><\/span> before starting the treatment<\/a> \u2013 I have to create a model of balance before fixing the imbalance.<\/span><\/p>","align_tablet":"center","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"24","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"6360f3d","elType":"section","settings":{"margin":{"unit":"px","top":"50","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"30","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"30","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"b50d9c1","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":100,"_inline_size":null},"elements":[{"id":"2fe028d","elType":"section","settings":{"structure":"20"},"elements":[{"id":"efec880","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":60,"_inline_size_tablet":100,"content_position":"center","space_between_widgets":8,"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"55","bottom":"0","left":"10","isLinked":false},"padding_tablet":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"10","bottom":"0","left":"10","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"73d80eb","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Stealth Ailments Stemming From Auto Injuries","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"title_color":"globals\/colors?id=secondary","typography_typography":""},"title_color":"#212934","typography_typography":"custom","typography_font_family":"Times New Roman","typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":28,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_weight":"700","typography_line_height_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":36,"sizes":[]},"_margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false},"align_tablet":"center","typography_line_height":{"unit":"px","size":48,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"d4e8149","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

Let\u2019s say you\u2019ve seemingly dealt with your <\/span>car accident<\/span> and returned to everyday life. You got your insurance or settlement money, you had your car repaired, and you visited a doctor who assured you that everything is okay.<\/span><\/p>\n

Yet something still doesn\u2019t quite feel right. You may or may not be able to pinpoint what it is \u2013 a distant ache, a general feeling of discomfort, increased difficulty when performing mundane tasks, headaches, irritability and so on.<\/span><\/p>\n

As previously mentioned, it\u2019s very likely that the powerful shock from the <\/span>car accident<\/span> either created a <\/span>misalignment<\/a><\/span> or aggravated an existing condition. Some of my patients came to me years after their auto injury<\/a> made everyday life more difficult.<\/span><\/p>","align_tablet":"center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":true},{"id":"4407681","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":50,"_inline_size":40,"_inline_size_tablet":100},"elements":[{"id":"f842543","elType":"widget","settings":{"image":{"url":"https:\/\/puravidasanantonio.net\/wp-content\/uploads\/2023\/05\/Pura-Vida-Chiropratic-Stealth-Ailments-Stemming-From-Auto-Injuries.jpg","id":3407,"size":"","alt":"","source":"library"},"image_border_radius":{"unit":"px","top":"8","right":"8","bottom":"8","left":"8","isLinked":true}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":true},{"id":"75278b2","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

While exceptionally strong, the spine and its vertebrae are more vulnerable to sudden stress than you might think. These so-called \u2018stealth\u2019 injuries aren\u2019t nearly as apparent as a full-on fracture, but will eventually show: lifting that household object might inexplicably become more difficult, or sitting upright much harder as the hours go by.<\/span><\/p>\n

Don\u2019t ignore the warning signs and silent cries of your body \u2013 it knows when it\u2019s hurting, and so do you, even if your doctor says otherwise. No pain and discomfort should be called normal \u2013 if you feel like you haven\u2019t been the same ever since you had a <\/span>car accident<\/span>, schedule a visit to Pura Vida Chiropractic<\/a>. We promise to make things better than they were even before the injury took place.<\/span><\/p>","align_tablet":"center","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"20","right":"0","bottom":"0","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"bfb0cdc","elType":"widget","settings":{"youtube_url":"https:\/\/youtu.be\/08Zh3oOtrag","vimeo_url":"https:\/\/player.vimeo.com\/video\/403945402?autoplay=0&autopause=0","dailymotion_url":"https:\/\/www.dailymotion.com\/video\/x6tqhqb"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"video"}],"isInner":false}],"isInner":false},{"id":"6c77416","elType":"section","settings":{"background_background":"classic","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"50","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"margin_mobile":{"unit":"px","top":"38","right":0,"bottom":"0","left":0,"isLinked":false},"__globals__":{"background_color":"globals\/colors?id=1cf2376"}},"elements":[{"id":"6fccbe6","elType":"column","settings":{"_column_size":100,"_inline_size":null},"elements":[{"id":"acd8d0f","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"
